race.comment: AYE AYE SKIPPER (4) is going better than his form reads and gets his chance to put it all together this time from the favourable draw. Expect him to be in this for a very long way. SNEAKY RICH (5) ran a better race when he did his best work late to finish fourth last time out over 1190m at Grafton. Peaking now and will appreciate the rise in trip. Watch for him launching late. BATTLEDANCE (6) was an eye-catcher fresh before scoring by a nose here second-up. Left himself with too much to do last time but did warm nicely late to finish fifth. Will likely drift back from his draw and be saved for the final shot at them. Don't dismiss. KING SOLEIL (10) doesn't win out of turn but shoulders peaks that measure up and is drawn kindly. In the mix.
